topic: Sales Revenue, Receivables, and Cash Management
title: Revenue Recognition: Sales revenue is recognized when cash is received, regardless of...
summary: Evaluate whether revenue should be recognized when cash is received or when goods are delivered.
prompt: Sales revenue is recognized when cash is received, regardless of the delivery of goods.
solution: According to the revenue recognition principle, sales revenue is recognized when goods are delivered, not when cash is received. This principle is crucial for proper accounting practices.
